description: Register MELZAR as a nonphysical global word object so the canonical SAY OBJECT grammar resolves it before invoking the learned spoken-word action

replacements.new:
<GLOBAL SHADOW-FOLLY-CARRIED-FIRE <>>

<OBJECT SHADOW-MELZAR-WORD
	(IN GLOBAL-OBJECTS)
	(SYNONYM MELZAR)
	(DESC "word MELZAR")
	(FLAGS NDESCBIT)
	(ACTION SHADOW-MELZAR-WORD-F)>

<ROUTINE SHADOW-MELZAR-WORD-F ()
	<COND (<VERB? SAY>
	       <V-SHADOW-MELZAR>)
	      (<VERB? EXAMINE>
	       <TELL "MELZAR is a learned maintenance word, not a portable object." CR>)
	      (T
	       <TELL "The word MELZAR can be spoken, but it cannot be manipulated as an object." CR>)>
	<RTRUE>>

<ROUTINE SHADOW-PERFORM
